seo.title: Internal Tools & Admin Panels implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Internal Tools & Admin Panels projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist outlines the technical requirements for moving internal dashboards and admin panels from local development or low-code staging to a production environment, focusing on security, data integrity, and operational reliability.

items.title: SSO Integration
items.description: Verify that authentication is tied to the corporate Identity Provider (SAML/OIDC) and that public registration is disabled.

items.title: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) Mapping
items.description: Map internal user roles (e.g., support, finance, admin) to specific UI permissions and API scopes to ensure least-privilege access.

items.title: Session Expiration Policy
items.description: Configure session timeouts to expire after a maximum of 12 hours of inactivity to mitigate risks on shared workstations.

items.title: MFA Enforcement
items.description: Ensure Multi-Factor Authentication is required for all users accessing production data environments.

items.title: Service Account Isolation
items.description: Verify that the admin panel uses a dedicated database user with restricted permissions rather than a superuser account.

items.title: Destructive Action Confirmations
items.description: Implement double-confirmation modals for any 'Delete' or 'Bulk Update' actions to prevent accidental data loss.

items.title: Server-side Validation
items.description: Confirm that all write operations validate data types, lengths, and constraints on the server, not just in the UI components.

items.title: Optimistic UI Rollbacks
items.description: Ensure that if an optimistic UI update fails, the application state reverts correctly and displays a clear error message.

items.title: Input Sanitization
items.description: Check that all custom SQL or API queries use parameterized inputs to prevent injection attacks within the admin tool.

items.title: Draft State for Complex Forms
items.description: Implement local storage or database-backed draft saving for forms with more than 10 inputs to prevent data loss on disconnect.

items.title: Server-side Pagination
items.description: Configure all tables to use limit/offset or cursor-based pagination at the database level rather than fetching full datasets.

items.title: Query Debouncing
items.description: Apply a minimum 300ms debounce to all search bars and filter inputs to reduce unnecessary load on backend APIs.

items.title: Query Timeouts
items.description: Set explicit execution timeouts (e.g., 30 seconds) for all database queries to prevent long-running processes from hanging.

items.title: Response Payload Compression
items.description: Verify that Gzip or Brotli compression is enabled for JSON payloads exceeding 10KB.

items.title: Asset Caching
items.description: Configure Cache-Control headers for static assets and infrequently changed reference data like category lists or status codes.

items.title: Audit Log Implementation
items.description: Ensure every write operation records the User ID, timestamp, IP address, and the 'before' and 'after' state of the record.

items.title: Error Boundary Coverage
items.description: Wrap major UI sections in error boundaries to prevent a single failed component from crashing the entire dashboard.

items.title: Centralized Logging
items.description: Verify that frontend and backend errors are piped to a centralized tool like Sentry, Datadog, or LogRocket.

items.title: API Latency Monitoring
items.description: Set up alerts for P95 latency spikes on critical admin endpoints used for customer support or order management.

items.title: Usage Analytics
items.description: Track which features or internal tools are being used to identify and deprecate unused dashboards.

items.title: Environment Variable Separation
items.description: Strictly separate production database credentials and API keys from staging and development environments.

items.title: Read-Only Mode for Staging
items.description: Ensure the staging version of the admin panel is connected to a sanitized database or a read-only replica.

items.title: Versioned Releases
items.description: Export tool definitions (JSON/YAML) to a Git repository and use a CI/CD pipeline for deployment instead of manual 'Publish' buttons.

items.title: Dependency Scanning
items.description: Run automated vulnerability scans on all NPM packages or library dependencies used in the custom admin build.

items.title: Health Check Endpoints
items.description: Implement a /health endpoint that verifies connectivity to the primary database and upstream APIs.
